title: potentilla butandae
intro: Potentilla butandae, also known as the Butan Potentilla, is a plant species belonging to the Rosaceae family, native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Potentilla butandae include reducing fever, treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and providing relief from respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and provide therapeutic benefits.
